data.raceComments: {"comment":"14. CASH finished third of nine at Morphettville Parks two starts back then went one better last time out over 1600m at this track when sent out as the favourite. Jett Stanley scored on him last time and retains the ride. Jumping from a good draw can repeat the dose. 1. ARRAN BAY is racing well, scoring two runs back in the LR C S Hayes Memorial Cup at this track then finishing a close fourth of 13 last time over 1600m at Flemington after racing on the speed into the turn. Has recorded two wins from six starts and should be figuring in the finish. 5. VERDAD looks close to a win, finishing in the placings at his last two runs including a third last start over 1600m at Flemington. Will race on the speed and is in the mix.","runners":[14,1,5],"exclusive":true}

extraMarkets.name: MORPHETTVILLE-R6-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
